ShortDescription.Value: Change Blue Color on everything to Any color / Any opacity. Surface tool QoL, turn preview layers off.

Publish.LongDescription:
- Change the ubiquitous Blue outline color that appears on everything in the game - Any object you can hover over can change: all buildings, cars, cims, trees and more! - Guidelines - opacity slider - Surfaces: turn off the preview layers while in Surface tool so you can see the actual colors without a cloudy preview layer on top. - District tool: change color of district borders and overlays or turn them off completely.
- If you can hover over it then you can probably change it :)
### Feedback and Support: Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like free mods, give a Like :)
### Credits River-Mochi - modder/maintainer Flashbond - collab, tech feedback, testing yenyang - collab, tech feedback, testing StarQ - tech feedback, testing gagaxm - feature idea, testing Dx, Necko1996, Noel, BugsyG - testing
